name: 3pk 3'' x 4'' 3'' x 5'' 3'' x 6'' LED Flameless Black Wick Candle Cream - Threshold™
description:
Create a glowing space while adding a decorative touch with this Three-Pack of LED Flameless Black Wick Candle from Threshold™. Each piece in this three-pack of flameless candle looks like a pillar candle and comes in a varying size, with an LED bulb fitted inside. With a realistic black wick, this LED candle set will add a warm and inviting touch to your decor. Mix it in with other decorative elements to spruce up the look of your space.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
